name: R F INDUSTRIES LTD
business: RF Industries, Ltd. is a national manufacturer and marketer of interconnect products and systems, including RF connectors, coaxial cables, custom cabling, and integrated systems such as thermal cooling and small cell enclosures. It sells primarily to telecommunications carriers, equipment manufacturers, wireless and network infrastructure providers, and OEMs across multiple industries.
sellsTo: wireless and network infrastructure carriers and manufacturers

exposures.sentence: Our product line focus is to support and leverage our distribution channels with our core passive interconnect and cable assemblies offering, while in parallel we continue to expand our portfolio of integrated solutions to address key end customer and market applications, such as wireless and public safety communications.
We are heavily dependent upon wireless and broadband communications providers.
We design, manufacture, and sell cable assemblies and wiring harnesses for industrial, oilfield, instrumentation, medical, manufacturing, and aerospace and defense applications.
